title: StatementClass
description: Classification of every claim in a generated answer. Conflating these classes is the primary way this system could cause industrial harm, so the class is a first-class, mandatory field on every claim.
$comment: historical_observation: something recorded as observed in the past. recommendation: something a source advised, NOT necessarily done or approved. approved_procedure: an authorized instruction currently in force. completed_work: work recorded as actually performed. inference: a conclusion synthesized from evidence, not stated verbatim in any source.
